description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest Docker image with a docker:dind service. Define a single stage called build and a manual job named build that runs the following shell commands in order: apk update, apk add curl, docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com, curl -k -L --compressed $IMAGE_URL | docker load, and docker push registry.gitlab.com/signal9/ubuntu-build-env/image. The job is configured with when: manual so it only runs on manual trigger. No caches, artifacts, or additional variables are defined.
